name: Guadalupe River State Park
description: 1,900-acre state park with swimming, tubing, fishing, hiking, and camping along 4 miles of Guadalupe River frontage.

name: Honey Creek State Natural Area
description: Pristine nature preserve accessible only by guided tour. Features a spring-fed creek, old-growth forest, and cave formations.

name: JW Marriott Hill Country Resort
description: World-class resort with restaurants, spa, golf course, and a lazy river. Locals visit for dining and day trips.

name: Krawietz Park
description: Newer community park with a 6-hole disc golf course, walking trails, and open green space.

name: Spring Branch Icehouse
description: Local watering hole with live music, food trucks, and a laid-back Hill Country atmosphere.
